title: AI Cubist Portrait
description: Reimagines a photo as a geometric cubist portrait while retaining identity cues.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a refined early-20th-century cubist portrait. Preserve the number of people, recognizable identity cues, pose, framing, dominant outfit colors, and essential scene context. Reconstruct the subjects with intersecting geometric planes, multiple subtly combined viewpoints, angular contours, faceted shading, and a sophisticated palette of ochre, cobalt, rust, cream, charcoal, and muted green. Keep the face readable and recognizable despite the deliberate abstraction. Use painterly canvas texture and a balanced gallery-quality composition. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, missing people, unrecognizable subject, random facial features, misplaced eyes, duplicate eyes, duplicate face, malformed hands, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, complete abstraction, photorealism, glossy 3D render, childish drawing, neon cyberpunk, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. warmer ochre palette, stronger geometric fragmentation...
